emails.subject: Torch Energy
emails.body: Torch Energy Attached is an amended and restate Torch confirm. The Exhibit was revised to add two more points. Let me know if you have any questions.

emails.subject: RE: Torch Energy
emails.body: RE: Torch Energy gerald, I can send executable documents to Torch, but I just need a contact name. Please let me know. lisa 5 4766

emails.subject: RE: Torch Energy
emails.body: Judy Thorne had sent out all earlier documents. I don't know who she sent them to. Nelson should know.
